provider_name.title: Provider Name
provider_name.description: Trading name of the energy retailer as shown on the bill (e.g. 'AGL', 'EnergyAustralia').

provider_abn.title: Provider ABN
provider_abn.description: Australian Business Number of the energy retailer (e.g. '11 222 333 444').

tax_invoice_number.title: Tax Invoice Number
tax_invoice_number.description: The explicit tax invoice number printed on the bill. If the provider uses the account number as the invoice number, put it here as well. Null if not explicitly shown.

account_holder_name.title: Account Holder Name
account_holder_name.description: Full name of the account holder as shown on the bill (e.g. 'Jane Citizen').

account_number.title: Account Number
account_number.description: Customer account number as shown on the bill (e.g. '123456').

service_address_street.title: Service Address - Street
service_address_street.description: Street number and name of the supply address (e.g. '1 Street Road').

service_address_suburb.title: Service Address - Suburb
service_address_suburb.description: Suburb or locality of the supply address (e.g. 'ANYTOWN').

billing_period_start.title: Billing Period Start
billing_period_start.description: Start date of the billing period (YYYY-MM-DD) (e.g. '2022-03-01').

billing_period_end.title: Billing Period End
billing_period_end.description: End date of the billing period (YYYY-MM-DD) (e.g. '2022-03-31').

total_electricity_kwh.title: Total Electricity Usage (kWh)
total_electricity_kwh.description: Total electricity consumed in kWh only if explicitly stated on the bill (e.g. 242.447). Null if not shown.

average_daily_usage_kwh.title: Average Daily Usage (kWh)
average_daily_usage_kwh.description: Average daily energy usage as printed on the bill (e.g. 31.66). Null if not shown.

total_excl_gst.title: Total Amount (excl. GST)
total_excl_gst.description: Total charges before GST in AUD (e.g. 844.36). Null if not shown.

total_gst.title: Total GST Amount
total_gst.description: Total GST (Goods and Services Tax) amount included in the bill in AUD (e.g. 135.80). Null if not explicitly shown.

total_incl_gst.title: Total Amount (incl. GST)
total_incl_gst.description: Total amount payable including GST in AUD (e.g. 928.80).

amount_due.title: Amount Due
amount_due.description: Final amount payable by the customer including GST after all adjustments, credits and previous balance in AUD (e.g. 650.82). Use the last highlighted payable amount on the bill.
